creator: rainer@ultra-secure.de
text:
In my tinderbox, I want to build rsyslog6 with pgsql-support, but the patch does not apply:

building rsyslog-6.2.2 in directory /usr/local/tinderbox/9.0-amd64-current-php5-mysql55
build started at Wed Aug 29 13:19:37 UTC 2012
port directory: /usr/ports/sysutils/rsyslog6
building for:  9.0-RELEASE-p3 amd64
maintained by: brd@FreeBSD.org
Makefile ident: $FreeBSD: ports/sysutils/rsyslog6/Makefile,v 1.1 2012/08/16 21:52:44 brd Exp $
prefixes: LOCALBASE=usr/local PREFIX=/usr/local
Begin Configuration:
---Begin Environment---

LOG_COMPRESSLOGS=0

OLDPWD=/
USA_RESIDENT=YES

WRKDIRPREFIX=/work

WITHOUT_X11=yes

PKGZIPCMD=bzip2
USER=root
INSTALL_NODEBUG=yes

CCACHE_MAX_SIZE=10G

SUEXEC_DOCROOT=/home

UNAME_v=FreeBSD 9.0-RELEASE-p3 #0: Wed Aug 29 14:48:33 CEST 2012    root@tinderbox.host:/usr/src/sys/magic/kernel/path
BLOCKSIZE=K
---End Environment---

---End OPTIONS List---

End Configuration.

EXTRACT_DEPENDS=

Fix: 

currently not known.
The lines where the patch applies are at a different location now (2375)
How-To-Repeat: see above
